prompt:
Studio photo, clean white background, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

Subject: A blonde woman sitting on the floor in a relaxed pose, facing the camera with a gentle smile. She has wavy hair, wears a white headband, gold hoop earrings, a beige tweed blazer dress with a white collared shirt underneath, and lace gloves and lace tights. The outfit has a vintage, elegant style.

Elements: Two cartoon characters posed next to her - a tall gray cartoon cat on her left in a confident pose with one hand on hip and one raised, and a small brown cartoon mouse on her right standing upright and looking up at her. The cartoon characters have a classic 2D animated style with bold outlines and flat colors.

Lighting: Bright, even studio lighting, soft shadows, high key background.

Style: Blend of live-action photography and 2D cartoon animation, clean
